title: Client auto replant
description: Fully client-sided mod to automatically replant crops that are being harvested
body:
# Auto replant

Simply harvest crops as usual. But with this mod seeds will be automatically planted on the same field while you harvest. You only need to have the required seeds in your hotbar.

## Why?

There already are much more fancy mods which provide this feature, but I was not able to find one without a server plugin/mod. I need a client-only solution, which I can use on vanilla servers. Thus I made this mod.

## WARNING:

This mod will simulate your player switching hotbar slots and clicking a field without looking at it. If a server has strong cheat protection, this might result in automated kicks and bans. On Vanilla servers, this mod causes no issues.

## Support

This mod will rarely see updates. As I only add support for versions which I actually use. That means one of each primary version normally.

I linked Discord. Join and nag me to update the mod - then I'll do it :)
